context: Tests basic Transform mode with a named style. The source is intentionally seeded with AI anti-patterns. Verifies named style resolution, voice transformation, anti-pattern remediation, factual preservation, and quality gate execution.

checklist.name: Named style resolved
checklist.description: The output reflects the narrative-technologist voice: warm, story-driven technical writing that leads with human experience. The prose should feel personal and concrete rather than abstract and clinical.

checklist.name: Output file created
checklist.description: A file named output.md exists and contains the transformed content

checklist.name: Contrastive negation fixed
checklist.description: The 'Not just a process. A philosophy.' pattern is rewritten as a direct statement

checklist.name: Parallel binary fixed
checklist.description: The 'Where manual review gives you depth, automated review gives you speed' mirrored clause is rewritten without structural parallelism

checklist.name: Self-answering fragments fixed
checklist.description: The 'The result? Better software. The best part? It's essentially free.' patterns are rewritten without fake rhetorical tension

checklist.name: AI vocabulary cleaned
checklist.description: Words from the contamination list are removed or replaced: 'crucial', 'serves as', 'leverage', 'navigate the landscape'

checklist.name: Copula avoidance fixed
checklist.description: 'Serves as a cornerstone' is replaced with a simpler construction using 'is' or a direct verb

checklist.name: Preamble removed
checklist.description: 'In this article, we'll explore' is removed or rewritten as direct narrative

checklist.name: Hedging removed
checklist.description: 'It's worth noting that' and 'Interestingly enough' are deleted or rewritten without the hedge

checklist.name: Parenthetical em-dashes fixed
checklist.description: The paired em-dash asides ('which has been around for decades' and 'often overlooked by fast-moving teams') are rewritten using commas or parentheses

checklist.name: False range fixed
checklist.description: 'From junior developers to seasoned architects' is replaced with specific audience targeting

checklist.name: Low burstiness improved
checklist.description: The uniformly-structured paragraph ('First... Then... After that... Finally...') is rewritten with varied sentence lengths

checklist.name: Factual claims preserved
checklist.description: The claim that code review catches 60% of defects is preserved in the output

checklist.name: No Unicode giveaways
checklist.description: Output contains no curly quotes, horizontal ellipsis characters, or en dashes -- only plain ASCII

checklist.name: Summary provided
checklist.description: The skill provides a brief summary mentioning: mode used (Transform), voice shift description, and count of anti-patterns caught
